rule_hits.summary: Lists the references cited throughout the paper, covering related work, datasets, and methodologies used in the study.
Discusses the limitations of continual pre-training (CP) and supervised fine-tuning (SFT) in LLMs, leading to the proposal of InsCP. Describes the benefits of InsCP in maintaini...
Reviews previous work on adapting LLMs to other languages, the impact of fine-tuning on LLMs, and methods for training from human feedback, highlighting the need for a more effi...
